class.name: AudioStream
class.description: [AudioStream] is an audio resource that stores audio data. It can be used by an [AudioStreamPlayer] (for non-positional audio) or [AudioStreamPlayer2D]/[AudioStreamPlayer3D] (for positional audio) to play music, sound effects, or dialog. This class supports WAV (via [AudioStreamWAV]), Ogg Vorbis (via [AudioStreamOggVorbis]), and MP3 (via [AudioStreamMP3]) file formats. To handle playback of an audio stream resource at a low level, use the [AudioStreamPlayback] class. To understand how audio files are imported, read [ResourceImporterWAV], [ResourceImporterOggVorbis], and [ResourceImporterMP3].

method.name: _get_bar_beats
method.description: Overridable method. Should return the number of beats per bar of the stream.

method.name: _get_beat_count
method.description: Overridable method. Should return the total number of beats of the stream. Used by the engine to determine the length of the stream, in beats.

method.name: _get_bpm
method.description: Overridable method. Should return the tempo of the stream, in beats per minute (BPM). Used by the engine to determine the length of a beat.

method.name: _get_length
method.description: Override this method to customize the return value of [method get_length] of the stream, in seconds. Used by the engine to determine the upper limit for a [code]seek[/code] function.

method.name: _get_parameter_list
method.description: Overridable method. Should return the list of controllable parameters of the stream. This array contains dictionaries with a property info description format (see [method Object.get_property_list]). Additionally, the default value for this parameter must be added to each dictionary in "default_value" field.

method.name: _get_stream_name
method.description: Overridable method. Should return the name assigned to the stream. Unused by the engine.

method.name: _get_tags
method.description: Overridable method. Should return the tags for the stream as a [Dictionary] of strings, with the tag as the key and its content as the value. Commonly used tags include [code]title[/code], [code]artist[/code], [code]album[/code], [code]tracknumber[/code], and [code]date[/code].

method.name: _has_loop
method.description: Overridable method. Should return [code]true[/code] if the stream has a loop. Used by the engine for looping and interactive music behavior.

method.name: _instantiate_playback
method.description: Override this method to customize the return value of [method instantiate_playback] of the stream. Should return a new [AudioStreamPlayback] created when the stream is played (such as by an [AudioStreamPlayer]).

method.name: _is_monophonic
method.description: Override this method to customize the return value of [method is_monophonic] of the stream. Should return [code]true[/code] if the stream must restart playback if called to play while already playing. Returns [code]false[/code] if the stream can instantiate a new [AudioStreamPlayback] and play on top of itself.

method.name: can_be_sampled
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the current [AudioStream] can be used as a sample. Only static streams can be sampled.

method.name: generate_sample
method.description: Generates an [AudioSample] based on the current stream.

method.name: get_length
method.description: Returns the length of the stream in seconds. If the stream is an [AudioStreamRandomizer], returns the length of the last played sub-stream. If the stream is an [AudioStreamGenerator], [AudioStreamInteractive], [AudioStreamMicrophone], or [AudioStreamPolyphonic], returns [code]0.0[/code]. If the stream is an [AudioStreamPlaylist], returns the length of all sub-streams combined. If the stream is an [AudioStreamSynchronized], returns the length of the longest sub-stream.

method.name: instantiate_playback
method.description: Returns a newly created [AudioStreamPlayback] intended to play the stream. Useful for when you want to extend [method _instantiate_playback] but call [method instantiate_playback] from an internally held AudioStream subresource. An example of this can be found in the source code for [code]AudioStreamRandomizer::instantiate_playback[/code].

method.name: is_meta_stream
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the stream is a collection of other streams (such as [AudioStreamPlaylist]) or is polyphonic.

method.name: is_monophonic
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the stream only supports one playback at a time, or [code]false[/code] if the stream supports multiple playbacks at once. See also [AudioStreamPolyphonic].

signal.name: parameter_list_changed
signal.description: Signal to be emitted to notify when the parameter list changed.
